reasoning: EURAUD is currently showing bearish signals. The daily and weekly RSI values are in oversold territory (34.97, 20.38) suggesting a potential bounce, but the longer-term Moving Averages (daily, weekly, monthly) are all significantly above the current price, indicating a downtrend. The recent daily candles also confirm the downward momentum. Therefore, SELL has the highest probability. BUY is riskier but still possible, that's why it has 25%, and HOLD has 30% since the price is now bouncing.
